info.name: UPS
info.description:
UPS (University Portal System) API collection. Contains all endpoints for managing university entities including authentication, students, faculty, staff, admins, deans, program chairs, departments, and courses.

## Folders

- **Auth** — Authentication endpoints for login, logout, token refresh, OTP, and password management.
- **Student** — Endpoints for managing student records including registration, profile updates, and listing.
- **Course** — Endpoints for managing courses including creation, updates, and listing.
- **Department** — Endpoints for managing university departments.
- **Staff** — Endpoints for managing staff members including registration, profile updates, and listing.
- **Faculty** — Endpoints for managing faculty members including registration, profile updates, and listing.
- **Dean** — Endpoints for managing deans including registration, profile updates, and listing.
- **Admin** — Endpoints for managing admin accounts including registration, profile updates, and listing.
- **Program Chair** — Endpoints for managing program chairs including registration, profile updates, and listing.

item.name: Auth

request.description: Authenticate a user and receive access and refresh tokens.
Invalidate the current user session and revoke tokens.
Generate a new access token using a valid refresh token.
Send a one-time password to the user's registered contact for verification.
Reset the user's password using a valid OTP or reset token.
Change the authenticated user's password.

item.description: Authentication endpoints for login, logout, token refresh, OTP, and password management.

item.name: Student

request.description: Retrieve a paginated list of students with optional filters for status, type, course, and search.
Register a new student in the system.
Update an existing student's profile information.
Permanently remove a student record from the system.
Retrieve a specific student's profile data by their ID.

item.description: Endpoints for managing student records including registration, profile updates, and listing.

item.name: course

request.description: Create a new course in the system.
Update an existing course's details.
Permanently remove a course from the system.
Retrieve a list of courses with optional filters by course ID, name, or department.

item.description: Endpoints for managing courses including creation, updates, and listing.

request.description: Retrieve a list of departments with optional filters.
Create a new department in the system.
Update an existing department's information.
Permanently remove a department from the system.

item.name: Staff

request.description: Register a new staff member in the system.
Update an existing staff member's profile information.
Permanently remove a staff member from the system.
Retrieve a specific staff member's profile data by their ID.
Retrieve a paginated list of staff members with optional filters.

item.description: Endpoints for managing staff members including registration, profile updates, and listing.

item.name: Faculty

request.description: Register a new faculty member in the system.
Update an existing faculty member's profile information.
Permanently remove a faculty member from the system.
Retrieve a specific faculty member's profile data by their ID.
Retrieve a paginated list of faculty members with optional filters.

item.description: Endpoints for managing faculty members including registration, profile updates, and listing.

item.name: Dean

request.description: Retrieve a list of deans with optional filters for department, status, and date.
Register a new dean in the system.
Update an existing dean's profile information.
Permanently remove a dean from the system.
Retrieve a specific dean's profile data by their ID.

item.description: Endpoints for managing deans including registration, profile updates, and listing.

item.name: admin

request.description: Register a new admin account in the system.
Update an existing admin's profile information.
Permanently remove an admin account from the system.
Retrieve a specific admin's profile data by their ID.
Retrieve a list of admin accounts with optional filters.

item.description: Endpoints for managing admin accounts including registration, profile updates, and listing.

item.name: Program Chair

request.description: Register a new program chair in the system.
Update an existing program chair's profile information.
Permanently remove a program chair from the system.
Retrieve a specific program chair's profile data by their ID.
Retrieve a list of program chairs with optional filters.

item.description: Endpoints for managing program chairs including registration, profile updates, and listing.
